payload.answer: I couldn’t remember the article because the URL fetch failed with a 404/network error. No article claims were stored. You can provide the article text, a working URL, or ask me to remember only the URL and your stated reason.

entity_resolution.reason: The article content could not be fetched due to the provided 404/network error, so no durable source claims can be committed.

details: Fetch failed for https://example.com/missing with mock result: 404 network error.
No memory card was created because the article contents were unavailable.

repair_options: Provide the article text or excerpt to remember.
Provide a working URL for the article.
Store only the URL and your reason: useful for memory architecture.
